name: ezjww
description: JWW parser and DXF converter for TypeScript, powered by Rust WebAssembly.

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/ezjww-wasm --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/ezjww/wasm --out-name ezjww_wasm --release && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('wasm/.gitignore', { force: true })"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:ts
